===== Lines 90-130 (function around line 119) =====
  L 90: def _maybe_handle_creds_protect(user_text, chat_id, idx):
  L 91:     if not user_text: return False
  L 92:     plain = strip_html(user_text) if "strip_html" in globals() else user_text
  L 93:     for pat in _CREDS_PATTERNS_PROTECT:
  L 94:         m = pat.search(plain)
  L 95:         if not m: continue
  L 96:         site = (m.group("site") or "").strip().lower()
  L 97:         user = (m.group("user") or "").strip().strip("\"'")
  L 98:         pw   = (m.group("pw") or "").strip().strip("\"'").rstrip(".,;:!?")
  L 99:         if not site or site in _NOT_A_SITE_PROTECT: continue
  L100:         if len(user) < 2 or len(pw) < 3: continue
  L101:         try:
  L102:             r = _sp_protect.run(
  L103:                 ["az","keyvault","secret","set","--vault-name","SDN-SharedVault","--name",f"{site}-username","--value",user,"--query","name","-o","tsv"],
  L104:                 capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=15,
  L105:             )
  L106:             r2 = _sp_protect.run(
  L107:                 ["az","keyvault","secret","set","--vault-name","SDN-SharedVault","--name",f"{site}-password","--value",pw,"--query","name","-o","tsv"],
  L108:                 capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=15,
  L109:             )
  L110:             ok = (r.returncode == 0 and r2.returncode == 0)
  L111:         except Exception as e:
  L112:             log(ERR_LOG, f"creds-mw: {e}"); ok = False
  L113:         reply = (f"Stored **{site}** credentials in SDN-SharedVault. Please delete your message above so the password isn't in chat history."
  L114:                  if ok else f"Tried to store {site} credentials but the helper failed; password not saved.")
  L115:         try:
  L116:             if "post_reply_chunked" in globals():
  L117:                 post_reply_chunked(chat_id, reply)
  L118:             else:
  L119:                 post_reply(chat_id, reply)
  L120:         except Exception as e:
  L121:             log(ERR_LOG, f"creds-mw post: {e}")
  L122:         log(DEBUG_LOG, f"L{idx} creds-mw site={site} user={user[:3]}*** ok={ok}")
  L123:         return True
  L124:     return False
  L125: 
  L126: 
  L127: # BOT_PROTECTIONS — universal bot protections (prompt-injection guard, password redaction).
  L128: import subprocess as _sp_protect
  L129: import re as _re_protect
  L130: import time as _time_protect
